creator: tony@git-pull.com
text:
$ sudo pkg check -d -a
Checking all packages: 100%
cairo has require a missing libraries: libEGL.so.1
clutter has require a missing libraries: libEGL.so.1
cogl has require a missing libraries: libEGL.so.1
kf5-baloo has require a missing libraries: liblmdb.so
kf5-plasma-framework has require a missing libraries: libEGL.so.1
plasma5-kinfocenter has require a missing libraries: libEGL.so.1
plasma5-kwayland has require a missing libraries: libEGL.so.1
qt5-gui has require a missing libraries: libEGL.so.1
vlc has require a missing libraries: libEGL.so.1

$ make install -n

:> export_syms
awk -f /sys/conf/kmod_syms.awk nvidia.ko  export_syms | xargs -J% objcopy % nvidia.ko
objcopy --strip-debug nvidia.ko
install -o root -g wheel -m 555   nvidia.ko /boot/modules
if type kldxref >/dev/null 2>&1; then  echo kldxref /boot/modules;  kldxref /boot/modules;  fi

for __file in /usr/local/lib/libvdpau.so /usr/local/lib/libnvidia-glsi.so.1 /usr/local/lib/libGL.so.1 /usr/local/lib/vdpau/libvdpau_nvidia.so.1 /usr/local/lib/vdpau/libvdpau_trace.so.1 /usr/local/lib/libvdpau_nvidia.so /usr/local/lib/libnvidia-cfg.so /usr/local/lib/libnvidia-tls.so.1 /usr/local/lib/libvdpau.so.1 /usr/local/lib/libnvidia-tls.so /usr/local/lib/libnvidia-glcore.so /usr/local/lib/libEGL.so /usr/local/lib/libGLESv2.so.2 /usr/local/lib/libGLESv1_CM.so.1 /usr/local/lib/libGL.so /usr/local/lib/libEGL.so.1 /usr/local/lib/libnvidia-gtk2.so.355.11 /usr/local/lib/xorg/modules/extensions/libglx.so /usr/local/lib/xorg/modules/extensions/libglx.so.1 /usr/local/lib/libnvidia-eglcore.so.1 /usr/local/lib/libnvidia-glcore.so.1 /usr/local/lib/libGLESv2.so /usr/local/lib/libnvidia-glsi.so /usr/local/lib/libGLESv1_CM.so /usr/local/lib/libnvidia-eglcore.so /usr/local/lib/libvdpau_trace.so /usr/local/lib/libnvidia-cfg.so.1 /compat/linux/usr/lib/libEGL.so /compat/linux/usr/lib/libEGL.so.1 /compat/linux/usr/lib/libvdpau_trace.so /compat/linux/usr/lib/libGL.so.1 /compat/linux/usr/lib/vdpau/libvdpau_trace.so.355.11 /compat/linux/usr/lib/vdpau/libvdpau_nvidia.so.1 /compat/linux/usr/lib/vdpau/libvdpau_trace.so.1 /compat/linux/usr/lib/vdpau/libvdpau_nvidia.so.355.11 /compat/linux/usr/lib/libvdpau.so.1 /compat/linux/usr/lib/libGLESv1_CM.so.1 /compat/linux/usr/lib/libGLESv1_CM.so.355.11 /compat/linux/usr/lib/libnvidia-glsi.so.355.11 /compat/linux/usr/lib/libvdpau.so.355.11 /compat/linux/usr/lib/libGLESv2.so.2 /compat/linux/usr/lib/libnvidia-tls.so.355.11 /compat/linux/usr/lib/libvdpau_nvidia.so /compat/linux/usr/lib/libGL.so.355.11 /compat/linux/usr/lib/libnvidia-eglcore.so.355.11 /compat/linux/usr/lib/libGLESv2.so.355.11 /compat/linux/usr/lib/libnvidia-glcore.so.355.11; do  /usr/bin/true "===> Checking file: ${__file}" ;  if [ -L ${__file} ] ; then  /usr/bin/true "	- File is a symlink, removing." ;  rm -f ${__file} ;  continue ;  fi ;  if [ ! -e ${__file} ] ; then  /usr/bin/true "	- File does not exist." ;  continue ;  fi ;  /usr/bin/grep 'nvidia id:' ${__file} > /dev/null 2>&1 ; RESULT=$? ;  if [ ${RESULT} -eq 0 ] ; then  /usr/bin/true "	- File has NVIDIA signature, removing." ;  rm -f ${__file} ;  continue ;  fi ;  SUFFIX=`pkg_info -qW ${__file}` ; RESULT=$? ;  if [ -n "${SUFFIX}" ] ; then  /usr/bin/true "	- File was installed by package ${SUFFIX}" ;  else  /usr/bin/true "	- File is unknown or orphaned." ;  SUFFIX="orig-`date "+%Y%m%d"`" ;  fi ;  /usr/bin/true "	- Creating backup." ;  FILE_NAME=`basename ${__file}` ;  DIR_NAME=`dirname ${__file}` ;  mv -f ${__file} ${DIR_NAME}/XXX-${FILE_NAME}.%%.${SUFFIX} ;  done
